session.user: Run the following commands sequentially and report results: ``` uv run ruff check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/naming.py src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_cmd.py tests/commands/workspace/create/test_output_modes.py tests/commands/workspace/create/test_plan_file_operations.py tests/commands/workspace/create/conftest.py && uv run pytest tests/commands/workspace/ -v ```
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check and pytest commands sequentially.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff linting check on specified files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on workspace command tests
